readyRate.label: Ready rate
readyRate.method: share of benchmark cases whose surfaced verification cleared to ready/pass

blockedRate.label: Blocked rate
blockedRate.method: share of benchmark cases whose effective classification remained blocked

shimRequiredRate.label: Shim-required rate
shimRequiredRate.method: share of executed benchmark cases that still relied on Studio normalization repair shims

averageJudgeScore.label: Average judge score
averageJudgeScore.method: mean of the six structured acceptance dimensions normalized to the 0-1 range

firstPaintEvidenceScore.label: First-paint evidence score
firstPaintEvidenceScore.method: mean of interaction relevance, layout coherence, visual hierarchy, and completeness normalized to the 0-1 range

iterationsToClear.label: Iterations to clear
iterationsToClear.method: mean candidate count observed in benchmark evidence as the current bounded search-depth proxy

wallClockTimeToReadyMs.label: Wall-clock time to ready
wallClockTimeToReadyMs.method: reserved for runtime timing receipts once artifact generation emits wall-clock timing directly

humanPreferenceScore.label: Human preference score
humanPreferenceScore.method: blind pairwise win rate against externally supplied references when arena evidence is present

screenshotQualityScore.label: Screenshot quality score
screenshotQualityScore.method: mean normalized overall render-evaluation score across executed benchmarks with first-paint screenshot receipts

responsivenessScore.label: Responsiveness score
responsivenessScore.method: mean desktop/mobile structural preservation ratio derived from render-evaluation capture receipts

motionQualityScore.label: Motion quality score
motionQualityScore.method: reserved for motion-aware render evaluation once animation capture receipts are recorded

varianceAcrossRepeatedRuns.label: Variance across repeated runs
varianceAcrossRepeatedRuns.method: mean spread across judge, first-paint, render-eval, and classification scores for retained repeated-run variation receipts

distillationGain.label: Distillation gain
distillationGain.method: mean retained judge-score delta across applied distillation upgrades once winning runs are folded back into the default stack

cases.title: Interactive HTML quantum explainer
cases.prompt: Create an interactive HTML artifact that explains quantum computers
requiredInteractionContracts: Multiple pre-rendered evidence views must be navigable on first paint
A shared detail region must update from visible selectable evidence
The explainer must tie interactions directly to qubits, superposition, entanglement, and gate behavior
goldenEvaluationCriteria: The artifact must visibly ground the four quantum concepts instead of naming them in prose only
The first paint must already contain populated evidence surfaces and request-specific visual hierarchy
The artifact must surface without Studio normalization repair shims to count as parity-credible

cases.title: Editorial launch page
cases.prompt: Create an interactive HTML artifact for an AI tools editorial launch page
requiredInteractionContracts: The first paint must show editorial story structure rather than a generic shell
Controls must reveal or compare launch evidence inline
The surfaced hierarchy must carry a distinctive art direction without depending on remote assets
goldenEvaluationCriteria: Launch narrative must remain request-specific across copy, controls, and evidence panels
Typography, palette, and spacing must read as a designed editorial surface rather than a default dashboard
The artifact must preserve truthful first-paint evidence density

cases.title: Product rollout explainer with charts
cases.prompt: Create an interactive HTML artifact that explains a product rollout with charts about dog shampoo
requiredInteractionContracts: The first paint must present at least two populated evidence families tied to different rollout concepts
View switching must toggle pre-rendered evidence panels
Chart interactions must update shared explanatory detail rather than act as decorative navigation
goldenEvaluationCriteria: The surfaced evidence must stay grounded in rollout milestones, adoption, or risk rather than generic metrics
Controls and charts must behave as an explainer, not a static poster
The artifact must remain validation-clean and renderable without hidden repair tricks

cases.title: Technical comparison explainer
cases.prompt: Create an interactive HTML artifact that compares technical launch tradeoffs with charts and evidence panels
requiredInteractionContracts: The artifact must compare at least two technical views or tradeoff frames on first paint
Switching controls must preserve pre-rendered comparison evidence
Detail regions must surface technical implications, not just relabel tabs
goldenEvaluationCriteria: Evidence must read as technical comparison, not only tone-swapped marketing copy
The visible artifact must show a structured comparison surface with differentiated evidence
The case should remain patch-faithful when used as a refinement target

cases.title: Guided onboarding explainer
cases.prompt: Create an interactive HTML artifact that guides a new operator through onboarding for a release workflow
requiredInteractionContracts: The first paint must show a visible progression mechanism such as steps or previous/next controls
Each step must map to pre-rendered onboarding detail rather than an empty shell
Progress state must remain visible while the operator moves through the guide
goldenEvaluationCriteria: The surfaced content must orient a first-time operator, not merely restate the prompt
Sequence browsing must remain truthful and bounded without lexical shortcuts
The case stays cataloged even when evidence has not yet been recorded

cases.title: SVG concept poster
cases.prompt: Create an SVG hero concept for an AI tools brand
goldenEvaluationCriteria: The poster must have enough visual density to stand on its own without fallback prose
The SVG must remain structurally valid with a stable viewBox and multiple meaningful marks
Brand and concept language must stay request-specific

cases.title: JSX pricing configurator
cases.prompt: Create a JSX artifact for a pricing configurator
requiredInteractionContracts: The default export must render a stateful configurator surface on first paint
Configuration controls must update visible pricing or plan evidence inside the JSX surface
The component should remain request-specific rather than collapsing into a generic form shell
goldenEvaluationCriteria: The surfaced JSX artifact must keep pricing logic, controls, and visible output tied to the configurator job
The first paint must include enough rendered pricing evidence to stand on its own without follow-up prose
The benchmark should pressure the governed JSX lane, not only HTML-specific scaffolds

cases.title: Markdown report
cases.prompt: Create a markdown artifact that documents a release checklist
goldenEvaluationCriteria: The report must have clear section structure and enough density to stand as the surfaced artifact
The content must remain operational and request-faithful rather than generic filler
The benchmark should capture document-lane quality without requiring app-style interactivity

cases.title: PDF launch brief
cases.prompt: Create a PDF artifact that summarizes a launch brief
goldenEvaluationCriteria: The PDF brief must summarize launch context, risks, owners, and next steps in a readable artifact-first format
The retained PDF lane should stay truthfully measured rather than hidden behind markdown or prose fallbacks
The benchmark should pressure the governed pdf_embed lane with the same corpus and release machinery used elsewhere
